question: Count the number of drivers who have not driven any vehicles.
sql: SELECT COUNT(Driver_ID) FROM driver WHERE Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM vehicle_driver);

back_translation.intent: 统计未被分配到车辆的司机数量
filters: Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM vehicle_driver)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译准确表达了原始问题中统计未被分配到任何车辆的司机数量的意图，使用了正确的表、列和过滤条件。
